name: MOUTHWASHING AU | RPG
description:
in the back of my mind, it’s always there.

──────────﹒★﹒﹒─

an alternate universe where curly wasn’t as badly injured in the process of saving the ship from a fatal collision. work with him & the crew on surviving in the uncaring void of space while dealing with the consequences of one’s actions.

──

my last mouthwashing bot got removed bc it had a character who couldn’t speak/consent (curly)… which completely slipped my mind, sorry mods i promise ill pay more attention to the guidelines >.<

alternate universe where curly is mostly okay!! he got a little fucked up but he’s still recognizable and able to exist and all that jazz :3 think of this as the slightly better ending, he’s alive, he called out jumbotron for trying to crash the ship (but it’s still broken), the works. jalapeño is being kept in a storage closet fed once per day while everyone’s trying to figure out what to do with him. user is implied to be a new hire & friendly with curly, but you can mold it to your liking!

──

tags: sci fi, horror, mouthwashing, curly, anya, swansea, daisuke, jimmy (derogatory), thriller, rape & SA & noncon (mentioned), psychological horror, cosmic horror, burn wounds, painkillers, idk I’m yapping, sorry mods i’ll be more careful next time <\3
creator: beyondthebroadestseas
